title: Converted: Training Through Practice
description: Structured media conversion of legacy contentData[207]. The original legacy slides remain available for comparison.

slides.title: Wax On, Wax Off
slides.body: Skill develops through simple forms repeated before their meaning is fully understood.

media.title: The Karate Kid - Wax On, Wax Off

slides.title: Sand The Floor
slides.body: A second practice scene for showing how embodied repetition becomes available under pressure.

slides.title: The Samsara Mandala
slides.body: A visual reminder that training happens inside repeated loops of perception, reaction, and release.
